concept: Conceive a turn-based title where you assemble and command a diplomatic delegation navigating complex negotiations between feuding insect civilizations. Select representatives with complementary temperaments and specialized knowledge to address specific cultural misunderstandings and historical grievances. Navigate intricate hive politics where pheromone-based communication creates subtle layers of meaning that can easily lead to disastrous misinterpretations. Prevent all-out war between the major arthropod factions whose conflict threatens to destabilize the entire garden ecosystem.
